props.text: Click Here To Start Your 14 Day Free Trial
About Us and About our Platform

At our core, we are a business growth platform built to simplify the way modern businesses operate, market, and scale. We understand the frustration of juggling multiple subscriptions, disconnected software, expensive tools, and complicated systems just to run a business efficiently. That’s why we set out to build a single platform that brings everything together in one powerful ecosystem.

Our platform combines the essential tools businesses need to grow — including CRM management, funnel building, email marketing, SMS campaigns, automation workflows, lead capture, calendar bookings, customer communication, sales pipelines, reporting, and much more. Instead of paying for multiple services that don’t communicate properly with each other, our users can manage everything from one central workspace designed for simplicity, performance, and scalability.


What makes our platform different is the flexibility we provide. Businesses can choose from ready-made plans or build a completely customised setup based on their exact requirements. Whether you are a startup, local business, agency, online brand, or growing enterprise, our system is designed to scale with you as your business evolves.

We’ve focused heavily on creating a platform that is not only powerful, but also easy to use. Many business tools are overloaded with complexity, hidden fees, and unnecessary features. We believe software should help businesses grow faster — not slow them down. Every feature we build is designed to save time, improve efficiency, automate repetitive tasks, and help businesses generate more leads, sales, and customer engagement.

Our mission is simple: to provide businesses with affordable, scalable technology that delivers real results without the overwhelming costs of managing multiple platforms. We are continuously developing new tools, integrations, and features to ensure our users always have access to modern solutions that help them stay ahead in an increasingly digital world.

props.title: Behind the Brand
Ready To See What Your Business Could Become?
props.description: Experience the platform built by business owners, for business owners. Get started with a FREE 14-Day Trial or book a personalised demonstration and see how easy it can be to manage, market, automate, and scale your business from one powerful platform.
props.text: Click Here To Start Your 14 Day Free Trial

Powerful Modules. One Connected Platform.

Our platform brings together powerful business tools designed to help you automate operations, increase productivity, generate more leads, and grow your business from one central ecosystem. Every module works independently while also integrating seamlessly together, giving businesses complete flexibility and control.

Whether you need a CRM, marketing automation, funnels, websites, bookings, social media management, communities, or communication tools, every module has been designed to simplify workflows, improve efficiency, and reduce the need for multiple disconnected software subscriptions.

From small businesses and tradies through to growing teams and larger organisations, our platform delivers the tools needed to manage customers, automate marketing, improve communication, and scale operations through intelligent AI-powered systems and streamlined business automation.

Explore our powerful range of modules below and discover how each system has been built to work together to create one complete business operating platform.

cards.title: Command Centre
cards.description:
The Command Centre gives you complete control of your business from one powerful central dashboard designed to simplify daily operations and improve productivity.

Monitor live business statistics, manage priorities, track performance, and stay organised with intelligent task management and real-time insights all in one place.

Everything you need is accessible from a single streamlined interface, helping your team work smarter, faster, and more efficiently every day.

cards.title: Email Marketing
cards.description:
Our powerful Email Marketing module helps you generate leads, nurture customers, and increase repeat business through smart automated communication.

Create professional campaigns using industry-specific templates, automated autoresponders, bulk broadcasts, and advanced customer journeys with ease.

The intuitive drag-and-drop automation builder makes it simple to design powerful workflows that keep your audience engaged and your business growing.

cards.title: Communities
cards.description:
Our Communities module helps businesses build stronger relationships through fully integrated local and global online communities.

Create private or public groups, manage member interactions, share updates, and encourage engagement from one central platform.

Keep your audience connected, informed, and actively involved while building long-term loyalty around your brand, business, or organisation.

cards.title: Calendar Bookings
cards.description:
Our smart Calendar Booking system simplifies appointment scheduling with fully automated online bookings and real-time availability management.

Allow customers to book appointments 24/7 while reducing no-shows through automated reminders, confirmations, and scheduling workflows.

Manage staff calendars, client bookings, and business availability from one easy-to-use platform designed to save time and improve organisation.

cards.title: CRM
cards.description:
Our advanced CRM module helps businesses manage sales teams, client relationships, pipelines, and opportunities from one powerful system.

Track deals, quotations, revenue, follow-ups, and customer activity in real time while keeping your entire sales process organised and efficient.

Built-in forecasting, KPI tracking, and performance reporting tools help your team stay focused, accountable, and consistently drive business growth.

cards.title: Funnel Builder
cards.description:
Our AI-powered Funnel Builder makes it easy to create high-converting sales funnels, lead capture pages, and automated customer journeys.

Design professional funnels in minutes using drag-and-drop simplicity, intelligent layouts, and built-in automation tools with no coding required.

Track conversions, automate follow-ups, and optimise every stage of your customer journey to generate more leads and increase sales.

cards.title: Landing Page Builder
cards.description:
Our Landing Page Builder lets you create stunning, high-converting pages quickly using an intuitive drag-and-drop editor and proven design templates.

Build fully responsive, professional landing pages tailored to any campaign, offer, or business goal without needing coding or design skills.

Optimise performance with built-in conversion tools, fast loading layouts, and seamless integration into your marketing funnels.

cards.title: Online Marketplace
cards.description:
Our Online Marketplace connects buyers and sellers of digital products, physical goods, and online courses within one powerful platform.

List, manage, and sell products easily while also accessing a built-in affiliate marketplace to expand reach and increase sales.

Vendors gain full control through a dedicated dashboard to manage products, track performance, and scale their business efficiently.

cards.title: SMS and Desktop Telephone
cards.description:
Our SMS and Desktop Telephone system lets you communicate with customers instantly through integrated messaging and calling from one central platform.

Run bulk SMS campaigns, handle inbound and outbound calls, and manage all customer communication directly from your dashboard.

With built-in call recording and AI transcription, you can review conversations, improve training, and enhance customer service quality.

cards.title: Social Media Manager
cards.description:
Our Social Media module allows you to manage, create, and publish content across more than a dozen platforms from one central dashboard.

Use AI-powered tools to generate content, schedule posts, and run consistent campaigns that keep your brand active and engaging.

Automate your social media presence to save time, grow your audience, and maintain consistent messaging across every channel.

cards.title: Website Builder
cards.description:
Our AI-powered Website Builder lets you create stunning, professional websites for any trade or industry in minutes.

Design fully responsive, interactive websites using drag-and-drop tools, smart layouts, and ready-made templates with no coding required.

Build a strong online presence with fast, optimised websites that are designed to convert visitors into customers.

cards.title: Builders Platform
cards.description:
Designed by Professional Builders for Professional Builders. 

Take control of every project with automated Gantt charts that help you plan schedules, manage resources, and keep jobs running on time.

Create professional estimates quickly and accurately with powerful estimating tools designed specifically for builders and construction companies.

Stay organised with visual job flow boards that give you a real-time overview of every project, helping your team track progress, manage workloads, and improve productivity.

props.headline: Gr8 Result Digital Solutions helps your audience take the next step faster
props.subheadline: Use this homepage to explain your main offer clearly, build trust quickly, and move visitors toward get more enquiries.

props.text:
EMAIL MARKETING

Email marketing remains one of the most powerful and profitable marketing channels available to any business. While social media platforms can be excellent for building awareness and attracting attention, the reality is that you don't own your followers. Algorithms change, accounts can be restricted, reach can be reduced overnight, and your audience ultimately belongs to the platform, not your business.

That's why experienced marketers often say, "The money is in the list." Every time you collect an email address, you're building a valuable business asset that you own and control. Unlike social media followers, your email database gives you direct access to your audience whenever you want to communicate with them.

Businesses that focus solely on social media without capturing email addresses are often leaving significant revenue on the table. You're spending time, effort, and advertising dollars attracting potential customers, only to let many of them disappear without any way to follow up. By capturing leads and nurturing them through email marketing, you can continue building relationships, providing value, and generating sales long after their first interaction with your business.

Email marketing allows you to stay connected with your audience, promote products and services, announce special offers, educate customers, and build long-term loyalty. Combined with automation and autoresponders, it becomes a powerful system that works for your business around the clock, helping turn enquiries into customers and customers into lifelong advocates for your brand.

contentBlocks.text: Automated email responders that nurture your leads 24/7

Set up powerful autoresponder sequences that engage your audience from the moment they sign up. Deliver the right message at the right time without lifting a finger.

Email autoresponders are one of the most powerful tools a business can use to build stronger customer relationships and improve client retention. By automatically delivering the right message at the right time, businesses can stay connected with customers long after the initial enquiry, purchase, or interaction.

contentBlocks.label: increase in open rates
contentBlocks.number: 312%

contentBlocks.text: Reach your entire list with one powerful send

Launch targeted broadcast campaigns to your full list or segmented audiences. Track opens, clicks, and conversions in real time with beautiful analytics.

Email broadcasts are perfect for announcements, promotions, newsletters, product launches, and important updates. Deliver your message directly to your subscribers' inboxes and reach thousands of contacts instantly.

Plan, design, and execute complete email campaigns with our drag-and-drop builder. A/B test subject lines, preview on all devices, and optimise for maximum ROI.

Successful email marketing is more than sending messages—it’s about creating strategic campaigns that guide your audience toward action. Build targeted campaigns with professional templates, compelling content, audience segmentation, and performance tracking.

Create intelligent email sequences that automatically engage leads, nurture prospects, and convert customers while you focus on growing your business.

Email automation allows you to deliver the right message at exactly the right time without lifting a finger. Welcome new subscribers, follow up on enquiries, nurture prospects through the buying journey, recover abandoned opportunities, and re-engage inactive customers automatically. With powerful triggers, conditions, and workflows, your business can stay connected with every lead and customer 24/7 while saving countless hours of manual work.

OUR PRICING

props.rightTitle:
At Gr8 Result Digital Solutions, we believe powerful business software shouldn't cost a fortune. That's why we've spent countless hours designing and developing a platform that combines the tools businesses need most into one powerful ecosystem—without the excessive price tags and complicated contracts that have become common throughout the industry.

Unlike many platforms that force businesses into expensive all-or-nothing subscriptions, we've built our system to be flexible. You can start with a complete package or simply choose the modules you need today and add more as your business grows. Whether you're looking for CRM, Email Marketing, SMS Marketing, Funnel Building, Website Creation, Social Media Management, Calendar Bookings, Communities, Business Automation, or Project Management, you only pay for what delivers value to your business.

Our mission has always been simple: provide world-class business and marketing tools at a price that allows businesses of all sizes to compete, grow, and thrive. We've worked hard to keep our pricing fair, transparent, and scalable, ensuring that startups, small businesses, growing teams, and established organisations can access enterprise-level technology without enterprise-level costs.

As your business evolves, your platform can evolve with you. Upgrade individual modules, increase usage limits, add team members, or move to a larger plan at any time. You're never locked into features you don't need, and you'll always have the flexibility to build the perfect solution for your business.

We've done everything possible to create a platform that delivers exceptional value, powerful functionality, and room to grow—all while keeping affordability at the heart of every pricing decision we make. Our goal is simple: help you achieve better results, faster growth, and greater profitability without the burden of unnecessary software costs.

props.rightContent:
A CRM (Customer Relationship Management) system is one of the most valuable tools a growing business can implement. Many businesses still rely on spreadsheets, notebooks, email inboxes, and memory to manage customer relationships, leads, quotes, and follow-ups. While this may work in the early stages, it quickly becomes difficult to maintain consistency, resulting in missed opportunities, forgotten follow-ups, and lost revenue.

The Gr8 Result CRM is designed to centralise every customer interaction in one easy-to-manage platform. Every lead, customer enquiry, quote, phone call, email, SMS conversation, task, and appointment can be stored and tracked from a single dashboard. This gives business owners and their teams complete visibility over their sales pipeline, ensuring no lead falls through the cracks and every opportunity is followed up at the right time.

One of the biggest advantages of the Gr8 Result CRM is automation. Instead of manually chasing leads, setting reminders, or sending follow-up emails, the system can automate these tasks for you. Automated workflows, email campaigns, SMS reminders, and task scheduling help businesses respond faster, nurture prospects more effectively, and convert more enquiries into paying customers. The result is increased efficiency, improved customer experiences, and significantly higher conversion rates.

For businesses that have never used a CRM before, the impact can be immediate. Teams become more organised, communication improves, and management gains real-time visibility into sales performance. Business owners can instantly see where leads are coming from, which team members are performing best, which marketing campaigns are generating results, and where opportunities are being lost. This level of insight allows businesses to make smarter decisions based on real data rather than guesswork.

Unlike traditional CRM systems that can be complex and difficult to implement, the Gr8 Result CRM has been built with simplicity and usability in mind. Its intuitive interface allows businesses to get up and running quickly while still providing the powerful tools needed to scale. Whether you're a small business looking to improve lead management or a growing company needing advanced automation and reporting, the Gr8 Result CRM provides the foundation for sustainable growth.

Ultimately, businesses that use a CRM close more sales, deliver better customer service, and operate more efficiently than those that don't. The Gr8 Result CRM gives businesses the tools, automation, and visibility they need to turn more enquiries into customers, retain those customers for longer, and create predictable, scalable growth.

props.headline: Project Hub
props.subheadline: Plan Jobs, Track Progress & Deliver Projects On Time

bodyBlock.content: Plan Jobs, Track Progress & Deliver Projects On Time

props.title: A project command centre built to replace the disconnected tool stack

images.content: Lead, quote, approval, schedule, task, document, update, invoice and report - finally connected.

props.title: The flagship project operating system inside Gr8 Result
props.leftContent:
Most project-based businesses do not lose money because the team is lazy. They lose money because the information needed to run the job is scattered across quoting software, spreadsheets, inboxes, SMS threads, calendars, whiteboards, cloud folders and accounting tools. Every handover creates another opportunity for scope to be misunderstood, materials to be missed, deadlines to slip and owners to lose visibility.

Project Hub exists to remove that fragmentation. It connects the commercial side of the job with the operational side, so the quote that was sold, the schedule that was planned, the tasks that were assigned and the reports the owner needs all live inside the same platform. That is the difference between simply tracking jobs and actually operating a project-based business with control.

props.title: What changes when the workflow is connected
props.subtitle: Project Hub is designed around measurable operational improvements: fewer duplicated steps, clearer accountability and faster decision-making.

stats.label: Admin reduced
stats.detail: Less retyping between quote, schedule, task board and reporting tools.

stats.label: Deadlines protected
stats.detail: Milestones, dependencies and blockers become visible before they turn into expensive delays.

stats.label: Profit defended
stats.detail: Scope, variations, materials and labour stay connected to the job that is actually being delivered.

stats.label: Communication improved
stats.detail: Office staff, supervisors and owners can work from the same operational picture.

props.headline: Stop managing million-dollar work with disconnected tools
props.subheadline: Project Hub gives growing trade, construction and service businesses the kind of operational command centre usually reserved for enterprise platforms - without forcing the team into another isolated app.

headlineBlock.content: Stop managing million-dollar work with disconnected tools

bodyBlock.content: Project Hub gives growing trade, construction and service businesses the kind of operational command centre usually reserved for enterprise platforms - without forcing the team into another isolated app.

props.title: Estimator: from quote to project without double entry
props.leftTitle: Build quotes that are ready for real delivery
props.leftContent:
The Estimator is not just a price calculator. It is the commercial starting point for the project workflow. Your team can build detailed estimates with line items, quantities, labour allowances, material costs, markups, margins, optional extras and variations, then turn that commercial information into a client-ready proposal.

That matters because most delivery problems start before the job begins. If the estimate lives in one tool and the project plan lives somewhere else, the team has to manually translate the sold scope into tasks, dates and responsibilities. Project Hub reduces that waste by making the estimate the foundation of the project, not a separate document that gets forgotten after approval.

The result is fewer missed inclusions, faster handovers, cleaner variation control and better protection for margin. Competitors often provide estimating as a separate module or expect integrations to stitch the process together later. Project Hub is designed so quoting and delivery belong to the same operational system from day one.

  • Itemised quote builder
  • Labour, materials and margin control
  • Variation and optional-extra tracking
  • Client-ready proposal structure
  • Approved quotes become project inputs

props.title: Estimator capabilities that protect profit before the job starts

items.title: Labour that does not vanish
items.body: Estimate labour with clearer allowances, roles and cost assumptions so the project starts with realistic expectations. Labour leakage is one of the fastest ways a profitable job becomes painful, so Project Hub keeps labour thinking visible from quote to delivery.

items.title: Materials with real scope context
items.body: Materials can be connected to the work being promised, not hidden in a spreadsheet that nobody checks after approval. This makes handover cleaner and helps the team understand what was included, what changed and what needs procurement attention.

items.title: Markup, margin and variation control
items.body: Margins are protected when changes are visible. Project Hub supports a workflow where optional extras and variations can be treated as part of the commercial record rather than informal messages that are hard to recover later.

props.title: Gantt Charts: turn the project into a living timeline
props.rightTitle: Plan dependencies, milestones and delays before they cost money
props.rightContent:
Gantt planning gives owners and project managers a timeline view of the work, but the real value is not the chart itself. The value is seeing the relationship between stages, dependencies, milestones, resource timing and delays before they quietly damage the job. A connected Gantt chart helps the team understand what must happen first, what can happen in parallel and what is blocking progress.

Project Hub brings that planning into the same platform as the quote, job board, documents and communication tools. That means the timeline is not just a pretty planning artifact; it becomes part of the operational record. When dates move, the team can see what is affected. When a dependency slips, the impact is easier to explain. When owners need visibility, they can see the planned path and the actual progress in one place.

Standalone Gantt tools can look powerful, but they often sit away from the work. Project Hub is built to connect the schedule to the tasks and business systems around it, which is where time is actually saved.

  • Timeline planning
  • Dependencies and blockers
  • Milestones and critical dates
  • Resource planning
  • Delay visibility and progress tracking

props.title: Scheduling intelligence for work that changes in the real world

items.title: Dependencies that expose risk
items.body: Dependencies help the team see when one task is holding up another. That makes delays easier to communicate, easier to recover from and easier to prevent next time.

items.title: Milestones that create accountability
items.body: Milestones give the project rhythm. They help owners, supervisors and team members understand which dates matter most and what has to happen to protect them.

items.title: Progress owners can understand
items.body: Project visibility should not require a meeting. Progress views help owners see where jobs stand, what is waiting and what needs attention.

props.title: Job Board: the live operating board for every active job
props.leftTitle: Move work through the business without losing context
props.leftContent:
The Job Board is where the plan becomes day-to-day execution. It gives the team a visual way to move work through stages such as pending, ready, in progress, waiting, review and complete. Tasks can carry owners, priorities, due dates, comments, files and status updates so the person doing the work has the context they need.

This is where Project Hub becomes practical. A Gantt chart can show the overall schedule, but the Job Board shows what the team should actually do next. It helps supervisors understand workload, helps office staff answer client questions and helps owners see whether the business is moving work forward or simply talking about it.

Generic task boards are common, but most are disconnected from the quote, client, documents and reporting context. Project Hub is different because the board is part of a broader business platform. The task is not isolated; it belongs to a job, a client, a timeline and a commercial outcome.

  • Kanban-style task stages
  • Assignments and due dates
  • Drag-and-drop movement
  • Comments, documents and updates
  • Status visibility for owners and teams

props.title: Job Board features that keep production moving

items.title: Assignments with ownership
items.body: Every task should have a clear owner. Assignments reduce the invisible someone-will-handle-it problem that causes work to stall between office, site and management teams.

items.title: Files and comments where the work happens
items.body: Photos, notes, approvals and documents are most useful when they sit next to the task they relate to. Project Hub reduces the need to search inboxes and message threads for the latest answer.

items.title: Statuses that make bottlenecks visible
items.body: Status columns make it obvious when work is waiting, blocked, being reviewed or complete. That helps the team act earlier and gives owners a better operational view.

props.title: Workflow from lead to report
props.subtitle: The page is designed around the full operational journey, not one isolated module.

stats.label: CRM captures demand
stats.detail: The relationship starts in the same platform that will later manage the work.

stats.label: Estimator builds scope
stats.detail: Pricing, labour, material assumptions and options become structured project context.

stats.label: Client approves
stats.detail: The winning proposal becomes the bridge into delivery instead of another PDF in a folder.

stats.label: Project starts
stats.detail: The team gets a live workspace for tasks, documents, schedule and communication.

stats.label: Timeline is tracked
stats.detail: Dependencies, milestones and dates make delays visible earlier.

stats.label: Invoice and report
stats.detail: Completion, reporting and billing information can close the loop.

props.title: Traditional business vs Gr8 Result Project Hub
props.leftContent:
A lead enters the CRM, the quote is built somewhere else, the schedule is drafted in another tool, the job board lives in a separate app, files sit in a cloud folder, approvals are buried in email, reminders are sent manually and the owner asks for updates because reporting is not connected.

Every handover creates duplicated work. Every disconnected system adds subscription cost and training overhead. Every manual update increases the chance that the person making the next decision is working from old information.

  • CRM separate from estimating
  • Quote separate from delivery
  • Calendar separate from schedule
  • Tasks separate from documents
  • Reports rebuilt manually
props.rightContent:
Project Hub is designed to remove the duplication. Leads, quotes, projects, schedules, tasks, files, messages, automation and reporting can live inside one business platform. The team spends less time moving information between apps and more time moving jobs forward.

That is the strategic advantage. It is not simply one more module. It is the operational layer that makes the rest of the Gr8 Result platform more valuable because project delivery is connected to sales, communication, automation and reporting.

  • One connected customer and job record
  • Quote context carries into project delivery
  • Tasks and schedule support each other
  • Messages and documents stay near the work
  • Reporting becomes easier to trust

props.title: One platform advantage: every module strengthens Project Hub

items.title: CRM Integration
items.body: Client, lead and pipeline information can connect directly to the project record, reducing the gap between winning work and delivering it.

items.title: Calendar & Scheduling
items.body: Dates, bookings, resources and project milestones can work together instead of living in separate scheduling tools.

items.title: SMS & Email
items.body: Project updates, reminders and client communications can be supported by platform messaging instead of manual chasing.

items.title: Documents
items.body: Files, proposals, approvals, photos and updates stay close to the project context where the team needs them.

items.title: Reports
items.body: Owners can understand progress, bottlenecks and performance without rebuilding reports from multiple systems.

items.title: Accounting
items.body: Approved work, variations, completion status and billing context can support cleaner financial administration.

items.title: Communities
items.body: Teams, clients or member groups can be supported with communication spaces connected to the broader platform.

items.title: Funnels & Website Builder
items.body: Marketing pages, lead capture and project delivery can operate inside the same commercial ecosystem.

props.title: The project record becomes the source of truth

images.content: When every update belongs to the same project record, the business stops paying for confusion.

props.title: Executive visibility without another reporting meeting
props.subtitle: Owners should not have to ask five people for five different updates. Project Hub is built to make status, risk and momentum easier to see.

stats.label: Every active job visible
stats.detail: A clear operating view helps leaders see where attention is needed.

stats.label: Delays exposed earlier
stats.detail: Dependencies, blocked tasks and slipping dates are easier to identify.

stats.label: Variation context protected
stats.detail: Scope changes are less likely to disappear in informal conversations.

stats.label: Clients get clearer answers
stats.detail: The team can answer questions from a shared source of truth.

props.title: Built for the businesses competitors underserve
props.rightContent:
Tools like Procore, Buildertrend, Autodesk Construction Cloud, Monday.com, ClickUp and Asana can be powerful, but they often force businesses into either heavy construction-specific systems or generic work management tools. Small and growing project-based businesses need something different: enough structure to control real jobs, but enough simplicity to actually get adopted by the team.

Project Hub is positioned inside the broader Gr8 Result platform, which means it can connect to marketing, CRM, communication, automation, website tools and reporting instead of pretending project management happens in isolation. That connected approach is what makes the page, the product and the platform more compelling.

  • Premium SaaS operating model
  • Built for growing trade, service and construction teams
  • Connected to sales and marketing tools
  • Designed to reduce subscriptions and duplicated work
  • Clear enough for daily use
